title: Brand typography is a measurable multilingual contract
summary: Type roles include metrics, license, script coverage, fallbacks, word budgets, and production limits.
guidance: Define role tokens and validate hierarchy, overflow, font loading, localization, accessibility, and rights before release.
do: Record fallback metric overrides and supported scripts
Test real localized strings at viewport and zoom extremes
dont: Choose type because it resembles a reference brand
verification: Role specimens, license review, locale overflow tests, and font-loading evidence
